result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (DataError): (psycopg2.errors.InvalidDatetimeFormat) invalid input syntax for type interval: "3 quarter"
LINE 3: ...TE_TRUNC('quarter', DATE '2023-04-10') - INTERVAL '3 quarter...
                                                             ^

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         (DATE_TRUNC('quarter', DATE '2023-04-10') - INTERVAL '3 quarter')::date AS start_date,
         (DATE '2023-04-10')::date AS end_date
), history AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '')
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM history
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE COALESCE(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/9h9h)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         (DATE_TRUNC('quarter', DATE '2023-04-10') - INTERVAL '3 quarter')::date AS start_date,
         (DATE '2023-04-10')::date AS end_date
), history AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '')
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM history
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < (p.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE COALESCE(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE_TRUNC('quarter', DATE '2023-04-10') - INTERVAL '9 months')::date AS start_date,
         (DATE '2023-04-10')::date AS end_date
), history AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_date::timestamp
              AND ch.createddate::timestamp < (p.end_date::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE LOWER(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid')
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND REGEXP_REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') <> REGEXP_REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '')
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM history
  WHERE old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(c.ownerid,''), '^#', '') AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_date::timestamp
              AND c.createddate::timestamp < (p.end_date::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE COALESCE(c.ownerid,'') <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
), candidates AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
  WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM candidates
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
